about.missionSubtitle: To empower young people and community initiatives in Azerbaijan by connecting them with opportunities, organizations, and each other.
about.dataChallengeSubtitle: Many young people in Azerbaijan struggle to access reliable information about opportunities, training, or volunteering programs.
about.culturalStigmaText: Information about opportunities is fragmented and unstructured, making it difficult for youth to discover relevant programs.
about.institutionalGapsText: Limited interaction between NGOs and young people creates barriers to participation in social initiatives.
about.limitedTransparencyText: Lack of dedicated spaces for sharing experiences and success stories hinders peer learning and inspiration.
about.resourceConstraintsText: Insufficient access to personal and professional development resources limits youth potential.
about.impactIntro: icma360 is a digital ecosystem where young people and organizations meet, learn, and grow together:
about.developStrategies: Find opportunities faster with category-based filtering
about.allocateResources: Connect with NGOs and community initiatives directly
about.measureProgress: Share experiences and learn from peers
about.advocatePolicy: Access free learning and development resources
about.technologySubtitle: A centralized hub connecting youth with opportunities, community, and learning resources.
about.newsScrapingText: Discover youth programs, internships, and volunteer openings from NGOs and community initiatives across Azerbaijan.
about.multipleSourcesDaily: Category-based filtering by topic, date, and location
about.sourceVerification: Personalized notifications based on your interests
about.aiClassificationText: A social space where youth share ideas, stories, and lessons learned to encourage peer support and collaboration.
about.patternRecognition: Comment on and engage with other posts
about.dataVisualizationText: Access free materials and training content focused on self-development, social engagement, and career growth.
about.platformPurposeSubtitle: Bridging the gap between youth and organizations to create a transparent and accessible ecosystem for growth.
about.openMethodology: Youth can find relevant opportunities faster
about.sourceAttribution: NGOs reach their target audiences more effectively
about.regularUpdates: Communities build stronger foundations for progress
about.comprehensiveLibrary: All content verified through public or official sources
about.educationalMaterials: No commercial or exploitative use of data
about.communityBlog: Personal information kept private and secure
about.emergencyResources: Platform serves educational and community purposes only
about.limitationsEthicsSubtitle: We stay transparent about our platform limits and the safeguards behind every insight.
about.onlyPublicReports: Every story shared contributes to collective growth
about.mayNotReflectScale: Every opportunity discovered opens new doors
about.aiMayContainBias: Every connection made strengthens our community
about.regionalCoverageVaries: Together, we build an ecosystem of opportunity
about.noPersonalInfo: Join as a youth member to explore opportunities
about.victimPrivacy: Register as an organization to share your programs
about.dataForAwareness: Share your experience and inspire others
about.aiPrinciples: Be part of a connected and empowered generation
about.disclaimerText: We're guided by principles of trust, inclusivity, and transparency. icma360 is more than a website — it's a growing network of young people who learn, share, and support each other in building a better Azerbaijan.
about.joinMovementText: Be part of a new generation of connected and empowered youth. Together, we're building an ecosystem of opportunity and collaboration in Azerbaijan.
about.communityGrowthText: New members and partners join us every week.
about.privacyCommitmentText: Data stays secure thanks to strict transparency and safety practices.
about.continuousImprovementText: We iterate constantly based on community feedback.
about.transparentMonitoringText: We make progress visible while respecting privacy and ethical safeguards.
about.actionableInsightsText: We provide tools to help NGOs design targeted interventions that maximize impact.

disclaimer.title: Data Accuracy Notice
disclaimer.strong: This data is AI-generated from scraped news and may be inaccurate.
disclaimer.body: The statistics shown are collected from publicly available news sources and automatically categorized using artificial intelligence. This data may contain errors, biases, or inaccuracies and should not be used as the sole source for critical decisions. Many incidents go unreported, so these numbers represent only documented cases from public sources.

footer.aboutText: A public platform aimed at youth development, community connections, and support for social initiatives.
footer.disclaimerText: This platform is developed for educational and public engagement purposes. All content and opportunities are sourced from verified public channels and organizations.
footer.builtWith: Built with Next.js for youth empowerment and community building.

header.notificationsAppearHere: Notifications will appear here when you receive them

home.heroTitle: Support for Youth and Community Development in Azerbaijan
home.heroSubtitle: A public platform that brings together youth, NGOs, and social initiatives to create opportunities for learning, collaboration, and growth.
home.missionText1: Today, many young people and social initiatives face challenges in development, connection, and visibility. Our mission is to create an inclusive digital space where youth and organizations can connect, learn, and access new opportunities.
home.missionText2: We believe that connection, collaboration, and education are the foundation of sustainable development.
home.transparentInfoText: Verified and regularly updated opportunities, volunteer programs, and internship announcements from local and international organizations.
home.learningDevelopmentText: Free training materials, resources, and courses for youth to develop personal, social, and career skills.
home.communitySharingText: An open community space where youth share their experiences, success stories, and ideas through blogs and peer discussions.
home.joinText1: Be part of a community where youth connect and grow together.
home.joinText2: If you want to find opportunities, share experiences, and connect with organizations - icma360 provides you with all the possibilities for development and contribution.
home.disclaimer: This platform is developed for educational and public engagement purposes. All information and opportunities are sourced from verified public channels and organizations. icma360 does not guarantee employment or selection in shared announcements.
This platform facilitates connections and information sharing. Always verify opportunities independently and exercise caution when sharing personal information.

hero.title: Community Support Resources
hero.subtitle: Curated tools, organizations, and opportunities to advance gender equality and strengthen survivor support.

educationalMaterials.title: Educational Materials
educationalMaterials.description: Access comprehensive toolkits, courses, videos, and downloadable guides focused on gender equality and community wellbeing.

ngoDirectory.title: NGO Directory
ngoDirectory.description: Discover and connect with organizations advancing gender equality and survivor services across Azerbaijan.

jobOpportunities.title: Job Opportunities
jobOpportunities.description: Find employment, volunteering, and internship opportunities with organizations supporting gender equality and community care.

events.title: Events
events.description: Discover upcoming events, workshops, and programs to strengthen your gender equality advocacy skills.

categoriesSection.subtitle: Access curated resources tailored to your needs, from training materials to urgent support.

emergency.title: Need Immediate Help?
emergency.description: If you or someone you know is experiencing violence or needs urgent protection, help is available 24/7. Contact emergency services or specialized support organizations.

materials.tryDifferentFilters: Try adjusting your search or filters

cta.title: Ready to Make a Difference?
cta.description: Share your resources with our community or explore more materials to support gender equality.

heforshe.title: HeForShe Toolkit
heforshe.description: Comprehensive toolkit for engaging men and boys as advocates for gender equality. Includes practical guides, campaign materials, and implementation strategies.

economicEmpowerment.title: Women's Economic Empowerment
economicEmpowerment.description: Training modules and resources for promoting women's economic participation and entrepreneurship.

course1.title: Gender and Development
course1.description: Explore how gender affects development outcomes and learn evidence-based approaches to promoting gender equality in development programs.

course2.title: Human Rights Law
course2.description: Understanding international human rights law and its application to gender equality and protection from discrimination.

course3.title: Women's Entrepreneurship
course3.description: Learn strategies for supporting women entrepreneurs and creating inclusive business environments.

featured.title: Understanding Gender-Based Violence
featured.description: This educational video explains the different forms of gender-based violence, its root causes, and the importance of prevention strategies. Learn about recognizing warning signs and supporting survivors.

contentWarning.title: Content Warning
contentWarning.description: This video discusses sensitive topics related to gender-based violence. Viewer discretion is advised.

guide1.title: Gender-Based Violence Prevention Toolkit
guide1.description: Comprehensive 50-page guide with evidence-based strategies for preventing gender-based violence in communities, workplaces, and educational institutions.

guide2.title: Women's Legal Rights in Azerbaijan
guide2.description: Legal handbook covering women's rights under Azerbaijani law, including domestic violence protections, workplace rights, and legal remedies.

report.title: Global Gender Gap Report 2024
report.description: World Economic Forum's comprehensive analysis of gender parity across 146 countries, including Azerbaijan's progress and rankings.

placeholders.applicationInstructions:
Please include the following in your application:
• Your resume/CV
• A cover letter explaining your interest
• Portfolio or relevant work samples (if applicable)
• Contact information for 2-3 references

Applications should be submitted in PDF format with the subject line: [Position Title] - [Your Name]
